_help.about: Copy this file to config.json, then replace every <...> placeholder with your environment values. config.json is gitignored so your values are never committed.
_help.notes: Keys starting with '_' are documentation only and are ignored by the tool. Omit or null the *_log objects to run Check 5/6 in manual-input fallback mode.

dns_resolver_log._note: Optional. Log Analytics workspace that captures DNS/Private Resolver queries. Omit to use manual fallback for Check 5.

apim_gateway_log._note: Optional. Log Analytics workspace that captures APIM gateway requests. Omit to use manual fallback for Check 6.
